caption: A person wearing a blue and grey plaid shirt is in a room with light-colored wooden tables and chairs. They begin by holding up a blue smartphone, showing the home screen with various app icons. In the next sequence, the phone is mounted horizontally onto a black handheld gimbal stabilizer, and the person holds the device to show its screen, which displays a dark interface with orange and white icons. The person then turns the phone around to reveal the back, where a circular white mount with the text "COPI" is attached to the blue casing. Finally, the person adjusts the black gimbal stabilizer, holding it by the handle and manipulating the head of the device. Throughout the scene, a white open box and a black fabric pouch remain stationary on the wooden table surface.
